page_content:
Formerly: MUET679.

MUSC680 Seminar in Music of Antiquity and the Middle Ages (3 Credits) Research topics in music from antiquity to 1450.

MUSC682 Seminar in Music of the Baroque Era (3 Credits) Seminar in music of the Baroque era. Research topics in music from 1600 to 1750.

MUSC683 Seminar in Music of the Classic Era (3 Credits) Seminar in music of the Classic era. Research topics in music from 1750 to 1820.

MUSC684 Seminar in Music of the Romantic Era (3 Credits) Seminar in music of the Romantic era. Research topics in music from 1820 to 1900.

MUSC685 Seminar in Music of the 20th Century (3 Credits) Seminar in music of the twentieth century. Research topics in music from 1900 to the present.
